name: Thrangirfin
bio:
Physical Appearance: Bosmer (Wood Elf) male wearing light armor - boots and cuirass. May also wear a light helmet, shield, greaves, and gauntlets. Armed with a bow and arrows that may be enchanted.
Race: Bosmer
Personality Keywords: hunter, thief, hostile, aggressive, criminal, cave dweller
Role: Thrangirfin is a hunter hiding out with his criminal partners in Hrota Cave, located just north of Anvil. He combines archery skills with priest spells, making him a dangerous opponent. He carries a large amount of gold.
Home Location Information: Hrota Cave, north of Anvil. He waits just past the first group of thieves in the cave.
Daily Routine: Thrangirfin remains in his position in the cave at all times, never sleeping or eating. He stays alert and ready for combat.
Personality - The Cave Hunter: Thrangirfin is hostile and aggressive, attacking intruders on sight without warning or explanation. He will not accept any attempt at surrender or negotiation.
author: Bethesda
